title: Ethics, Social Media and Teacher Education, 2012/2013, part 2 and 3
description:
This dataset contains data from part 2 and part 3 of a longitudinal survey. The data collections for part 2 and 3 were financed by PHS. Part 2 followed the participants up with a web based questionnaire, and part 3 followed up some of the participants with an interview. Part 2 and 3 followed up part 1 which was a paper-based survey funded by the research group "Digital Learning Communities" at the Faculty of Psychology, UiB and consists of a selection of teacher students (n = 475) from teacher education programs throughout Norway. The questionnaire used in Part 2 was based on Part 1 with some modifications.

Quantitative data are freely available for downloading. NSD can in agreement with the Principal Investigator make qualitative data from part 3 available when ordered.
